records.question: Which people weigh exactly 200.0 and were perpetrators in incidents in Beijing, China where exactly 80 were injured, at least 23 were killed, and the year is at most 1994?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN perpetrator ON people.people_id = perpetrator.people_id
WHERE perpetrator.injured = 80 AND perpetrator.location = 'Beijing' AND perpetrator.killed >= 23 AND perpetrator.country = 'China' AND perpetrator.year <= 1994.0 AND people.weight = 200.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p."People_ID"
FROM "people" p
INNER JOIN "perpetrator" per ON p."People_ID" = per."People_ID"
WHERE p."Weight" = 200.0
AND per."Location" = 'Beijing'
AND per."Country" = 'China'
AND per."Injured" = 80
AND per."Killed" >= 23
AND per."Year" <= 1994

records.question: Is there a John Danks who weighs at least 190.0 and is at most 6.6 tall?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
WHERE people.name = 'John Danks' AND people.weight >= 190.0 AND people.height <= 6.6
records.pred_sql: SELECT "people"."People_ID" FROM "people" WHERE "people"."Name" = 'John Danks' AND "people"."Weight" >= 190.0 AND "people"."Height" <= 6.6

records.question: Can you tell me about Rob Cunningham who weighs exactly 215.0 and is at most 6.8 tall?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
WHERE people.height <= 6.8 AND people.weight = 215.0 AND people.name = 'Rob Cunningham'
records.pred_sql: SELECT "People_ID" FROM "people" WHERE "Name" = 'Rob Cunningham' AND "Weight" = 215.0 AND "Height" <= 6.8

records.question: Which Ron Baxter who weighs at most 205.0 and is at most 6.4 tall was a perpetrator in Uiryeong, South Korea in 1982 on 04.26 April 26/27 and killed exactly 56?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN perpetrator ON people.people_id = perpetrator.people_id
WHERE perpetrator.killed = 56 AND perpetrator.country = 'South Korea' AND people.weight <= 205.0 AND people.name = 'Ron Baxter' AND perpetrator.location = 'Uiryeong' AND perpetrator.date = '04.26 April 26/27' AND perpetrator.year = 1982.0 AND people.height <= 6.4
records.pred_sql:
SELECT p."People_ID"
FROM "people" p
JOIN "perpetrator" pr ON p."People_ID" = pr."People_ID"
WHERE p."Name" = 'Ron Baxter'
AND p."Weight" <= 205.0
AND p."Height" <= 6.4
AND pr."Location" = 'Uiryeong, South Korea'
AND pr."Year" = 1982
AND pr."Date" LIKE '%04.26%'
AND pr."Killed" = 56

records.question: Who from South Korea was a perpetrator on 04.26 April 26/27 with at least 37 injured?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN perpetrator ON people.people_id = perpetrator.people_id
WHERE perpetrator.injured >= 37 AND perpetrator.date = '04.26 April 26/27' AND perpetrator.country = 'South Korea'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT people."People_ID"
FROM people
JOIN perpetrator ON people."People_ID" = perpetrator."People_ID"
WHERE perpetrator."Country" = 'South Korea'
AND perpetrator."Date" LIKE '%04.26%'
AND perpetrator."Injured" >= 37
